name: Awbury Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Awbury Recreation Center in Philadelphia, PA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Ballers Philadelphia
description:
Ballers is bringing country club sports to the city. Our first location in Philadelphia’s iconic Battery building is open to the public and features pickleball, padel, golf, squash and soccer - as well as an upscale bar & restaurant, event spaces, and members-only luxe locker rooms, recovery suite and gym. From the team that launched award winning hospitality projects including Fitler Club and Equinox Hotels, each Ballers location will feature unique elevated design and signature programming & activations. 

Our outdoor pop-up features two pickleball courts and one padel court and operates Spring through fall, weather dependent.
fees: Fee required — $20 open play, $88 court rental per hour, $5 Paddle Rental, $5 Ball Purchase, Book On our APP: BALLERS SOCIAL SPORTS

name: Bounce Pickleball - Philadelphia
description: Bounce Pickleball - Philadelphia is a place to play pickleball in Philadelphia, PA. There are 12 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. The courts can be reserved.

name: C.C.A. Baldi Middle School
description: C.C.A. Baldi Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Philadelphia, PA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Christian Street YMCA
description: Christian Street YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Philadelphia, PA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: East Passyunk Recreation Center
description: East Passyunk Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Philadelphia, PA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: East Poplar Playground
description: East Poplar Playground is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Philadelphia, PA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

open_play_schedule: When the courts are not reserved it is first come, first serve. You can't reserve a court at Seger unless you are a member.

description: Temporary line markings for two courts on outside handball court. Temporary nets available to borrow during rec center operating hours, or bring your own. Arrange (free) outdoor play and see irregular open play hours on discord with Fishtown Pickleball Club.
